name: fdms-bridge
description: ZIMRA FDMS Bridge - Rapid Roots Investment Pvt Ltd

scripts.openday: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {openFiscalDay} = require('./src/integrations/pdfFiscalizationService'); openFiscalDay().then(r => { console.log('Result:', r); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.closeday: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {closeFiscalDay} = require('./src/integrations/pdfFiscalizationService'); closeFiscalDay().then(r => { console.log('Result:', r); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.status: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {getFiscalDayStatus} = require('./src/integrations/pdfFiscalizationService'); getFiscalDayStatus().then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); });"
